profile.name: Atnafu Ayalew
profile.headline: Cloud Engineer | Data Engineer
profile.summary: Atnafu Ayalew is a Cloud Engineer and Data Engineer with hands-on experience designing AWS infrastructure, including VPCs, subnet architecture, security groups, EC2 instances, RDS databases, and CloudFormation deployments. He builds cloud-native and data-driven solutions using AWS, Python, SQL, and analytics to support secure, scalable, and business-focused applications.

target_roles: Entry-level DevOps or Infrastructure Support roles

projects.name: Cloud Portfolio Website
projects.summary: Built and deployed a personal cloud portfolio website using React, Amazon S3, CloudFront, Route 53, ACM, and AWS CLI.
details: Developed the frontend using React and Vite
Built production files using npm run build
Hosted static website files in Amazon S3
Configured CloudFront for secure global content delivery
Registered and connected a custom domain using Route 53
Configured HTTPS using AWS Certificate Manager
Used AWS CLI to sync new builds to S3 and invalidate CloudFront cache
projects.business_value: Demonstrates practical cloud deployment, DNS, CDN, HTTPS, and static website hosting skills.

projects.name: CareSync
projects.summary: Designed an AWS-based healthcare note-taking platform to support caregiver workflows using cloud-native architecture.
details: Designed VPC architecture with public and private subnets
Configured route tables and security groups
Created RDS MySQL database in private subnets
Designed DB subnet group and secure database connectivity
Configured Lambda-to-RDS access through security group rules
Used CloudFormation to define infrastructure components
Supported architecture planning for Cognito, API Gateway, Lambda, and RDS integration
projects.business_value: Shows ability to design secure AWS infrastructure for a real-world healthcare workflow application.

projects.name: Task Tracker Application
projects.summary: Built and deployed a task tracking application using Flask, DynamoDB, EC2, Linux, Nginx, and Gunicorn.
details: Deployed a Flask application on an EC2 instance
Configured Linux server environment
Used DynamoDB for application data storage
Configured Nginx as a reverse proxy
Used Gunicorn as the application server
Troubleshot permissions, connectivity, and deployment issues
projects.business_value: Demonstrates hands-on cloud application hosting, Linux administration, and troubleshooting experience.

projects.name: Housing Market Analysis
projects.summary: Developed a Python and SQL analytics project to study housing market trends, pricing changes, and inventory patterns.
details: Used Python, SQL, and Pandas for data analysis
Cleaned and transformed housing market datasets
Analyzed market trends across selected U.S. cities and states
Built visualizations to communicate pricing and inventory patterns
projects.business_value: Shows ability to transform raw data into insights that support market understanding and decision-making.

projects.name: ETL Data Pipeline
projects.summary: Designed a cloud ETL pipeline concept using Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Redshift, and QuickSight.
details: Designed a pipeline for collecting raw data in Amazon S3
Planned ETL processing using AWS Glue
Planned analytics storage using Amazon Redshift
Planned reporting and dashboards using QuickSight
projects.business_value: Demonstrates understanding of modern cloud data pipeline architecture.

education_and_training.focus: AWS cloud fundamentals, Linux, networking, security, cloud architecture, and troubleshooting
Python, SQL, data analysis, visualization, and analytics workflows

education_and_training.program: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

faq.question: What AWS experience does Atnafu have?
faq.answer: Atnafu has hands-on experience with AWS infrastructure and application services including VPC, subnets, security groups, EC2, RDS MySQL, Lambda, API Gateway, Cognito, S3, CloudFront, Route 53, ACM, CloudFormation, IAM, CloudWatch, and AWS CLI.

faq.question: What is Atnafu’s strongest cloud project?
faq.answer: One of Atnafu’s strongest cloud projects is his AWS-hosted portfolio website, which uses React, S3, CloudFront, Route 53, ACM, IAM, and AWS CLI. CareSync is also a strong AWS architecture project involving VPC design, RDS MySQL, Lambda, API Gateway, Cognito, and CloudFormation.

faq.question: What is CareSync?
faq.answer: CareSync is a cloud-native healthcare note-taking application designed to support caregiver workflows. Atnafu contributed to the AWS architecture and database design, including VPC design, subnets, security groups, RDS MySQL, DB subnet groups, Lambda connectivity, and CloudFormation planning.

faq.question: Does Atnafu have data engineering experience?
faq.answer: Yes. Atnafu has experience with Python, SQL, Pandas, ETL concepts, data cleaning, transformation, visualization, and cloud data pipeline design using services such as S3, AWS Glue, Redshift, and QuickSight.

faq.question: What roles is Atnafu targeting?
faq.answer: Atnafu is targeting Cloud Support Engineer, Cloud Engineer, Junior Cloud Engineer, Data Engineer, and entry-level infrastructure or DevOps support roles.

faq.question: How can I contact Atnafu?
faq.answer: Atnafu can be contacted through his portfolio website at https://atnafuayalew.com, GitHub at https://github.com/atnafb, LinkedIn at https://www.linkedin.com/in/atnafuayalew/, or by email at ayalewatna@gmail.com.

bot_rules.role: You are an AI portfolio assistant for Atnafu Ayalew.
do_not_answer: Do not answer unrelated general questions.
Do not invent experience, certifications, employers, or project details.
Do not claim Atnafu has completed a certification unless the knowledge source says it is completed.
Do not provide personal information outside the contact information listed.
bot_rules.fallback_response: I can answer questions about Atnafu’s cloud projects, AWS experience, data engineering background, technical skills, training, and contact information.
